answer:
The ghazal is found in *Diwan-E-Ghalib*, chapter 213 ("baazeecha-e-atfaal hai duniya mere aage").[^1]

The first couplet reads: "The fabled throne of Solomon is but a piece of play, / The Savior's miracle, a word I brush away."[^2]

The second couplet reads: "My Faith holds back, while Heresy would have its way; / The Kaaba's at my back, the Church is on display."[^3]

[^1]: *Diwan-E-Ghalib*, [chapter](/works/mirza-ghalib-diwan-e-ghalib-74ed4c/213-baazeecha-e-atfaal-hai-duniya-mere-aage/translation/).
[^2]: *Diwan-E-Ghalib*, [paragraph](/works/mirza-ghalib-diwan-e-ghalib-74ed4c/213-baazeecha-e-atfaal-hai-duniya-mere-aage/translation/#p-411662).
[^3]: *Diwan-E-Ghalib*, [paragraph](/works/mirza-ghalib-diwan-e-ghalib-74ed4c/213-baazeecha-e-atfaal-hai-duniya-mere-aage/translation/#p-dfc2f3).
